tools.name: Hori Hori Garden Knife
tools.description: The most versatile hand tool for any grower. Digs, cuts, measures soil depth, and transplants — one tool that replaces five.
tools.why: Every chapter in soil science and growing assumes you can get into the ground. This is how.

tools.name: LaMotte Soil pH Test Kit
tools.description: Accurate soil pH testing without sending samples to a lab. Essential for understanding nutrient availability before you plant.
tools.why: Soil pH chapter is meaningless without being able to test your own soil. This kit is what the professionals use.

tools.name: Field Guide to Texas Trees
tools.description: The definitive regional plant identification reference for Central Texas. Covers native and naturalized species with photographs.
tools.why: Plant taxonomy requires a good regional field guide. Most national guides miss half the Texas species.

tools.name: Echo SRM-225 String Trimmer
tools.description: Professional-grade string trimmer suitable for maintaining land and clearing growth around the homestead. Reliable 2-stroke engine, good parts availability.
tools.why: Maintaining clear paths, edges, and open areas is essential for a working property. A quality trimmer saves hours of hand work.
